testcase.name: Booking Module E2E Test Suite › [P0] should open Dialog overlay when Reservar is clicked on Desktop
Booking Module E2E Test Suite › [P0] should open Drawer overlay when Reservar is clicked on Mobile
Booking Module E2E Test Suite › [P1] should close Dialog overlay on Desktop via Escape key
Booking Module E2E Test Suite › [P0] should open modal and allow selecting a timeslot

failure.message: booking-modal.spec.ts:50:7 [P0] should open modal and allow selecting a timeslot

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › booking-modal.spec.ts:50:7 › Booking Module E2E Test Suite › [P0] should open modal and allow selecting a timeslot
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: getByRole('button', { name: /Disponible/i }).first() Expected: visible Timeout: 10000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 10000ms - waiting for getByRole('button', { name: /Disponible/i }).first()
